section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information
sentence: Hartlepool Borough Council (HBC) is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal information.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information
sentence: This privacy notice is issued in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and describes how we collect and use personal information about you.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information
sentence: This notice applies to information we hold about you.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information
sentence: It is important that you read this notice, together with any other privacy notices we may provide on specific occasions when we are collecting or processing personal information about you, so that you are aware of how and why we are using such information.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information
sentence: We may update this notice at any time.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: We will comply with data protection law which includes the GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018 which states that the personal information we hold about you must be: Used lawfully, fairly and in a transparent way.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: We will comply with data protection law which includes the GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018 which states that the personal information we hold about you must be: Collected only for valid purposes that we have clearly explained to you and not used in any way that is incompatible with those purposes.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: We will comply with data protection law which includes the GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018 which states that the personal information we hold about you must be: Relevant to the purposes we have told you about and limited only to those purposes.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: We will comply with data protection law which includes the GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018 which states that the personal information we hold about you must be: Accurate and kept up to date.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: We will comply with data protection law which includes the GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018 which states that the personal information we hold about you must be: Kept only as long as necessary for the purposes we have told you about.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: We will comply with data protection law which includes the GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018 which states that the personal information we hold about you must be: Kept securely

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation
sentence: No personal information held by us will be processed unless the requirements of the Data Protection legislation for fair and lawful processing can be met.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Controller?
sentence: HBC is a “data controller”. This means that we are responsible for deciding how we hold and use

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Controller?
sentence: personal information about you. We are required under data protection legislation to notify you of the information contained in this privacy notice.

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: We have appointed a data protection officer (DPO) to oversee compliance with this privacy notice. If you have any questions about this notice or how we handle your personal information, please contact the DPO: Hayley Martin, Head of Legal Services (Place)

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: We have appointed a data protection officer (DPO) to oversee compliance with this privacy notice. If you have any questions about this notice or how we handle your personal information, please contact the DPO: Hartlepool Borough Council

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: We have appointed a data protection officer (DPO) to oversee compliance with this privacy notice. If you have any questions about this notice or how we handle your personal information, please contact the DPO: Civic Centre

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: We have appointed a data protection officer (DPO) to oversee compliance with this privacy notice. If you have any questions about this notice or how we handle your personal information, please contact the DPO: Hartlepool

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: We have appointed a data protection officer (DPO) to oversee compliance with this privacy notice. If you have any questions about this notice or how we handle your personal information, please contact the DPO: TS24 8AY

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: We have appointed a data protection officer (DPO) to oversee compliance with this privacy notice. If you have any questions about this notice or how we handle your personal information, please contact the DPO: dataprotection@hartlepool.gov.uk

section: H2:Our commitment to being transparent about the use of your personal information > H3:The Data Protection Legislation > H4:Who is the Data Protection Officer?
sentence: You have the right to make a complaint at any time to the Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO), the UK supervisory authority for data protection issues.
